subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet from the Youth unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Powerful, the All-Protecting, the Mighty, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح من لدی الغلام الی الذی آمن بالله المقتدر المهیمن العزیز العلام طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
